parameters.query: select workflow_id, max(workflow_name) as workflow_name, max(started_at) as last_seen, extract(epoch from (now() - max(started_at)))::bigint as silence_seconds from public.workflow_heartbeats group by workflow_id;

select public.record_heartbeat('{{ $workflow.id }}'::text, 'success'::text, 'Workflow Dormancy Alerter'::text, '{{ $execution.id }}'::text, jsonb_build_object('silent_count', {{ $('Compute Silent').item.json.silent_count }}, 'total_expected', {{ $('Compute Silent').item.json.total_expected }}));
